cursed_eye.title: Craft the Cursed Eye (center: Scarlet Crown + sandy diamond block + lava power cell + withered nether star + vile herb)

place_cursed.title: Place the Cursed Eye in the final frame slot — the portal is nearly ready

subtitle.text: The last custom eye. The portal is now asking you the final question.

description: The Cursed Eye is in the frame.
Three anchor eyes placed (Nether, Guardian, Wither).
The Cursed Eye was always the last one.
Whoever designed this portal system knew what it would take.
The previous civilization made all the same discoveries.
Became the Wither Storm you just survived.
Twelve eyes placed. The portal is complete.
→ Place it in the portal frame [check]
